item.title:
Released wacrawl 0.1.0 🧾
A read-only CLI for archiving and searching local macOS WhatsApp Desktop d...
item.description:
Released wacrawl 0.1.0 🧾
A read-only CLI for archiving and searching local macOS WhatsApp Desktop data.
It snapshots WhatsApp’s SQLite DBs into its own archive, then gives you chat/message listing + FTS search. No extra auth needed, it just works. https://t.co/SLVLlA0vpP
--- @steipete | ❤️ 33 | 🔁 3 | 💬 6 | 👁 2073
item.author: @steipete
